systems.title: Enterprise RAG Platform
metrics: Substantial reduction in average answer time
Production support for concurrent user sessions

caseStudy.problem: Teams spent significant time searching across fragmented documentation and internal systems. Knowledge was siloed, answers were inconsistent, and onboarding required frequent interruptions to senior team members.
constraints: Mixed data: unstructured content and structured systems
caseStudy.approach: Built a modular retrieval-augmented system with adaptive multi-source retrieval, hybrid semantic plus lexical ranking, neural reranking, and intent-based routing for analytical questions.
outcomes: Average time-to-answer reduced from minutes to seconds
Improved self-service and reduced internal support interruptions
Consolidated knowledge access reduced conflicting answers

challenges.title: Multi-Collection Efficiency
challenges.problem: Querying all sources for every request introduced latency and noise.
challenges.solution: Used staged retrieval to probe sources first, then deep-retrieve only from relevant ones for faster and cleaner context assembly.

challenges.title: Semantic vs Keyword Trade-off
challenges.problem: Vector search missed exact terms; keyword search missed concepts.
challenges.solution: Applied a hybrid retrieval strategy combining semantic and lexical scoring to improve coverage and relevance.

challenges.title: Structured Data Queries
challenges.problem: Users asked analytical questions ('How many tools in category X?') that needed SQL, not document retrieval.
challenges.solution: Implemented intent-based routing to structured query execution for factual analytical responses.

principles.title: Data First
principles.description: Start with data reality, not models. Understand what you have before choosing architecture.

principles.title: Boring Works
principles.description: Prefer reliable, well-understood architectures over trendy solutions.

principles.title: Measure First
principles.description: Measure retrieval quality before generation. Evaluation drives improvement.

principles.title: Build to Last
principles.description: Design for maintainability, not demos. Production systems need to evolve.
